column16: Please review offer instructions in the supplements. Thank you for showing, your prompt feedback is greatly appreciated. TO SHOW: Schedule appointments via ShowingTime. Room dimensions are approximate; buyers should independently verify all measurements.
column17: Investor opportunity in Temple! This 2-bedroom, 1-bath home sits just 1 mile from Baylor Scott & White Hospital and approximately 3 miles from Temple College. The property is in need of renovation and is being sold as-is, making it a great project for investors, flippers, or buyers looking for a fixer-upper opportunity. Mature trees and in established neighborhood and conveniently located with quick access to major medical facilities, schools, and city amenities.
